subject: [BOM] Project HARBOUR-7 — initial spec
body:
Hola team,

Attached is the initial BOM for project HARBOUR-7. Please proceed with sourcing.

Gracias,
María

attachments.content:
PROJECT: HARBOUR-7
BOM REVISION: v1
DATE: 2026-05-02

LINE 1: Hot-rolled structural steel S355J2, plate, 6mm thickness, qty 120 TON
LINE 2: Galvanized Steel Type B, 3mm sheet, qty 45 TON
LINE 3: Reinforcing bar B500S, 16mm diameter, qty 30 TON
